underlying_goal: Design and plan an LLM-powered conversational layer (using Ollama + Llama 3B) between customer prompts and vector search to improve product recommendations through intent analysis and clarifying questions
friction_detail: Claude found an existing plan file with a different approach and had to reconcile/overwrite it, causing some back-and-forth before finalizing the plan.
brief_summary: User wanted a detailed implementation plan for adding an LLM conversational layer (Ollama + Llama 3B) to their neural search pipeline; Claude explored the codebase, asked clarifying questions, and saved a comprehensive plan document.
